# Improve README local setup steps

New contributors get stuck at setup/instructions.

## Task
- Audit current README.
- Add a “Local setup” section with:
  - backend setup
  - frontend setup
  - how to run the app
- Ensure commands are copy-pastable.

## Acceptance criteria
- README contains clear setup steps.
- Mention required environment variables.
